tool_input.description: Commit and push caliber learning state

branch 'claude/update-claude-md-GOKwQ' set up to track 'origin/claude/update-claude-md-GOKwQ'.

prompt_content: Appebear - how's this any travel or food words we czn replace bear with

tool_input.command:
check() {
  local d="$1"
  local r=$(curl -s "https://cloudflare-dns.com/dns-query?name=${d}&type=A" -H "accept: application/dns-json")
  local has_answer=$(echo "$r" | grep -c '"Answer"')
  if [ "$has_answer" -gt 0 ]; then echo "$d: TAKEN"; else echo "$d: possibly open"; fi
}
# Travel suffixes
for stem in appetrip appetour appetrail apperoute appeport appepost appehaven appepath apperoam appelane appenest appenook appehop appestop appebound appeway appemap appecompass appehorizon appejaunt; do
  check "${stem}.com"
  check "${stem}.app"
done
echo "---"
# Food suffixes
for stem in appebite appetaste appefare appefire appebread appespice appedish appeplate appemenu appechef appesalt appefeast appesavor appewok appeoven appehearth appesip appebrew appedine appefeast appedrop appecrust appecrumb; do
  check "${stem}.com"
  check "${stem}.app"
done
